topWPAPlays.description: Colson Montgomery homers (24) on a fly ball to right center field.
Kazuma Okamoto grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Sam Antonacci to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto out at 1st.
Nathan Lukes singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Miguel Vargas. Ernie Clement to 2nd.
Colson Montgomery singles on a ground ball to right fielder Nathan Lukes, deflected by first baseman Sean Keys. Miguel Vargas to 3rd.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. lines out to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Ernie Clement to 3rd.
Shohei Ohtani doubles (17) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Max Schuemann. Tommy Edman scores.
Trent Grisham homers (11) on a fly ball to right field.
Andy Pages doubles (22) on a fly ball to right fielder Max Schuemann. Tommy Edman scores.
Ben Rice doubles (17) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Andy Pages.
Freddie Freeman singles on a line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham. Shohei Ohtani scores.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. homers (14) on a fly ball to left center field.
Tommy Edman homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Freddie Freeman walks.
Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Miguel Rojas out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.
Mookie Betts strikes out swinging.
Victor Mesa Jr. hits an inside-the-park home run (7) on a line drive to right-center field.
Chandler Simpson doubles (10) on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Cedric Mullins to 3rd.
Victor Mesa Jr. challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Victor Mesa Jr. called out on strikes.

Caleb Durbin reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Junior Caminero. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Caleb Durbin to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.
Andruw Monasterio doubles (15) on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Caleb Durbin scores.
Francisco Lindor homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Bo Bichette scores.
Luis Torrens doubles (11) on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Brett Baty scores.
J.T. Realmuto grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Jared Young. Bryson Stott out at 2nd. J.T. Realmuto out at 1st.
Francisco Lindor singles on a line drive to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr. Luis Torrens scores. Juan Soto to 3rd. Bo Bichette to 2nd.
Edmundo Sosa grounds into a double play, third baseman Bo Bichette to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Brett Baty. J.T. Realmuto out at 2nd. Edmundo Sosa out at 1st.
Jake Burger singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Wyatt Langford scores. Brandon Nimmo to 2nd.
Wyatt Langford doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Nicky Lopez scores. Joc Pederson to 3rd.
Wyatt Langford pops out to first baseman Matt Olson in foul territory.
Austin Riley homers (11) on a fly ball to left field.

Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Evan Carter grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Jim Jarvis to pitcher Grant Holmes. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Evan Carter out at 1st.
Kyle Manzardo flies into a double play, center fielder Billy Cook to catcher Henry Davis. Chase DeLauter out at home. Brayan Rocchio to 2nd.
Travis Bazzana strikes out swinging and Steven Kwan caught stealing 2nd, catcher Henry Davis to shortstop Jacob Gonzalez to catcher Henry Davis.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Billy Cook triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Steven Kwan singles on a soft bunt ground ball to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Gabriel Arias scores. Petey Halpin to 3rd. Missed catch error by catcher Henry Davis.
Jacob Gonzalez doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Nick Gonzales scores.
Leody Taveras singles on a line drive to left fielder Yordan Alvarez. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso scores. Sam Huff to 2nd.
Yordan Alvarez doubles (20) on a line drive to right fielder Leody Taveras. Jose Altuve scores.
Yainer Diaz singles on a fly ball to center fielder Colton Cowser. LaMonte Wade Jr. to 3rd. LaMonte Wade Jr. advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Colton Cowser.
Gunnar Henderson singles on a line drive to left fielder Yordan Alvarez. Jackson Holliday scores.
Cam Smith called out on strikes.
Fernando Tatis Jr. singles on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Luis Rengifo scores. Jase Bowen scores. Luis Campusano to 3rd.
Nick Loftin grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Luis Rengifo to first baseman Ty France. Luke Maile out at 2nd. Nick Loftin out at 1st.
Jac Caglianone homers (16) on a fly ball to right field.
Jase Bowen doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins. Xander Bogaerts scores.
Jackson Merrill singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Luis Campusano scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd.
William Contreras homers (10) on a fly ball to center field. Jackson Chourio scores. Brice Turang scores.
Andrew Vaughn lines into a double play, shortstop Javier Sanoja to third baseman Leo Jiménez. Christian Yelich out at 3rd.
Brice Turang walks. Jackson Chourio to 2nd.
Andrew Vaughn called out on strikes.
Jackson Chourio singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
Alex Bregman homers (10) on a fly ball to left field. Seiya Suzuki scores.
Nico Hoerner triples (1) on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin, deflected by center fielder Luke Keaschall. Michael Busch scores. Alex Bregman scores. Ian Happ scores.
Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.
Carson Kelly singles on a ground ball to center fielder Luke Keaschall. Pedro Ramírez scores.
Seiya Suzuki doubles (16) on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin.
Nathaniel Lowe homers (11) on a fly ball to right field. Elly De La Cruz scores. JJ Bleday scores.
Tyler Stephenson homers (7) on a fly ball to left center field. Eugenio Suárez scores.
Sal Stewart homers (20) on a fly ball to center field. Dane Myers scores. Elly De La Cruz scores.
Hunter Goodman homers (28) on a fly ball to center field.
Kyle Karros singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder TJ Friedl.
CJ Abrams homers (21) on a fly ball to center field. Curtis Mead scores.
Harry Ford doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Dylan Crews scores.
Tyler Soderstrom singles on a ground ball to right fielder Dylan Crews. Alika Williams scores.
Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.
Dylan Crews homers (7) on a fly ball to left field.
Dillon Dingler strikes out swinging.
Kevin McGonigle homers (9) on a fly ball to left center field.
Oswald Peraza singles on a ground ball to third baseman Colt Keith. Vaughn Grissom scores.
Riley Greene homers (14) on a fly ball to right center field.
Nolan Schanuel singles on a line drive to center fielder James Outman. Zach Neto to 3rd. Mike Trout to 2nd.
Luke Raley homers (15) on a fly ball to right center field.
Luis Arraez doubles (22) on a line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Willy Adames scores.
Randy Arozarena singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Cole Young to 3rd.
Cole Young homers (13) on a fly ball to right field. Julio Rodríguez scores.
Weston Wilson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Grant McCray. Josh Naylor scores.
Nolan Arenado homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field. Tyler Locklear scores.
Jordan Walker pops into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Tyler Locklear. Bryan Torres out at 1st.
Max Kepler doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Lars Nootbaar. Jorge Barrosa scores.
Blaze Jordan triples (2) on a line drive to left fielder Max Kepler. Lars Nootbaar scores.
Iván Herrera singles on a ground ball to left fielder Max Kepler. JJ Wetherholt to 3rd.
